codeReview.summary: Commit 7eefc80 adds tracing instrumentation to all Axum handlers in src/api/handlers.rs and all Tauri commands in src-tauri/src/main.rs, matching the feature contract without changing control flow or return behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission/skill guidance mandates red-green TDD with a failing test first, but this feature's acceptance criteria are structural instrumentation coverage plus rust quality gates. That mismatch caused a justified procedure deviation.

summary: Reviewed the feature transcript skeleton and commit diff for m3-tracing-instrument-on-handlers. Requirements are fully covered and no blocking/non-blocking code issues were found.
